Name: Argo ATLS IKTI Rad
Description:
Manufacturer: ASD
Focus: Combat
 
Taking an Argo ATLS modified for combat by the Banu merchant Wikelo, ASD has made further adjustments to the power suit so that it's better able to survive the deadly radiation storms on Pyro I.
